title: Disable a very badly flaking healthcheck test
body: We'll reenable once the flake is fixed.

comments.body: @cevich @jwhonce Let's get this landed once tests go green

/lgtm

also, where can I find the Dockerfile for `docker.io/libpod/alpine_healthcheck:latest` ?  I can look at the inspect but I'd like to know how these are generated, perhaps it is the nginx server taking too long to startup and could we replaced with something simpler
@baude maintains that image - would be nice to get the Dockerfiles in this repo
